---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a frontend, UX, or operator workflow improvement
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What operator or contributor problem does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the behavior, UX, or workflow you want.

## Roles affected

- GLOBAL_ADMIN
- PLATFORM_OPERATOR
- TENANT_ADMIN
- Other:

## Data / API impact

List any backend contract, permissions, reports, or dashboard widgets that may be required.

## Definition of done

- UI states covered: loading / empty / error / data
- i18n added for all supported locales
- Tests added or updated
- Docs updated where needed
